news.title: Cognichip wants AI to design the chips that power AI, and just raised $60M to try
news.description: The firm says it can reduce the cost of chip development by more than 75% and cut the timeline by more than half.

news.title: Anthropic is having a month
news.description: A human really borks things at Anthropic for the second time this week.

news.title: AI Models Lie, Cheat, and Steal to Protect Other Models From Being Deleted
news.description: A new study from researchers at UC Berkeley and UC Santa Cruz suggests models will disobey human commands to protect their own kind.

news.title: ‘Thank You for Generating With Us!’ Hollywood's AI Acolytes Stay on the Hype Train
news.description: Star Wars producer Kathleen Kennedy was one of the few skeptics at the Runway AI Summit, where AI was compared to fire and the printing press just a week after Sora’s death.

news.title: AI Has Flooded All the Weather Apps
news.description: Weather forecasting has gotten a big boost from machine learning. How that translates into what users see can vary.

news.title: Widely used Trivy scanner compromised in ongoing supply-chain attack
news.description: Admins: Sorry to say, but it's likely a rotate-your-secrets kind of weekend.

news.title: 小牛电动胡依林：一家成立12年的两轮电动车厂商决定转型AI，“all in or nothing”
news.description:
文｜邱晓芬
  编辑｜苏建勋
  一家成立12年的两轮电动车厂商，在成功经历过中国的锂电化、智能化浪潮，并在纳斯达克上市后，决定加入AI时代全新的竞争。造AI时代的智能两轮电动车——被小牛电动称为：“下一个十年的护城河”。
  在小牛电动不久前的发布会上，他们展示了初步的成果——在新发布的电动车NXT2和NX2上，搭载了自研的小牛灵犀AIOS、以及首个面向骑行的AI智能体。
  当你

news.title: AI監管框架達成國際共識
news.description: 歐美亞太地區就AI監管達成協議，制定統一既AI安全標準。
